dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7080 IH: Waste Heat to Wattage Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Vasquez (for himself and Mr. Baird) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002 to include waste energy recovery as a source of renewable energy, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Waste Heat to Wattage Act of 2026.

section.header: Waste energy recovery as a source of renewable energy
section.text: Section 9001 of the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002 (7 U.S.C. 8101) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (15)(A), by striking or hydroelectric and inserting hydroelectric, or waste energy recovery; and
by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

The term waste energy recovery means heat or pressure that would otherwise be vented, released, throttled, or discharged from a commercial, residential, or industrial process that is recovered and used as the sole input for another purpose or process that generates electricity, including a waste heat to power or waste pressure to power system.
